# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Test

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        id: cache-node-modules
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-modules-${{ hashFiles('package*.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${runner.os}-node-modules-
            node-modules-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        id: cache-pip-packages
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/pip
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-packages-${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${runner.os}-pip-packages-
            pip-packages-

      - name: Cache configuration files
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        id: cache-config-files
        with:
          path: ~/.config
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-files-${{ hashFiles('config.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${runner.os}-config-files-
            config-files-

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build and test
        run: npm run build && npm run test

      - name: Cache environment-specific configs
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        id: cache-env-configs
        with:
          path: ~/.env
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-env-configs-${{ hashFiles('env.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${runner.os}-env-configs-
            env-configs-

      - name: Set environment variables from cached config files
        run: |
          export $(cat ~/.env | xargs)

      - name: Run tests with environment variables set
        run: npm run test-env

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        id: cache-build-outputs
        with:
          path: ./build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-outputs-${{ hashFiles('package.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${runner.os}-build-outputs-
            build-outputs-

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build
          path: ./build

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: npm run deploy
